name: Alligator Energy Limited
analysis: AGE's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 30% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.0390, stop A$0.0307, target A$0.0460 (0.84:1) — then trail it.
